relevance_reasoning: Evidence documents measured total food weight and divides by FDA single-serving reference (245g) for the same product model referenced in the claim anchor.
sufficiency_reasoning: Methodology is explicit and conservative: total stew weight divided by 245g per person yields 8–10 servings, matching the claim anchor.
extracted_key_facts: Total measured weight 1.96–2.45 kg; reference 245g/person; yields 8–10 people for PC201/PC200 series.
